name: Suspicious Remote Thread Created
description: Detection of suspicious processes creating remote threads in other processes. This technique is often used by malware to inject code, hide malicious activity within a legitimate process, and achieve privilege escalation. The event provides information on the source and target process, as well as the code that will run in the new thread.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a suspicious process, **{source_image}**, created a remote thread in the target process **{target_image}**. The event indicates that malicious code may have been injected into the target process. This is a strong indicator of **Process Injection** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1055**) and an attempt at **Privilege Escalation**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious code. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: source_image
parameters.description: The process image that created the remote thread.

parameters.name: target_image
parameters.description: The process image where the remote thread was created.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
